narrative:
Allen County has 63,132 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.3% of registrants.
